title: The Recipe Pot
canonical_topic: Culinary-taxonomy project skill-matching system where cooperative projects declare skill recipes and members contribute matching spices (skills) to fill team positions, operationalizing the Stone Soup fable into a platform matching infrastructure.
composing_primitives: Spice Rack taxonomy shared with content classification
Recipe editor for project skill declarations
Pot status interface showing filled vs. open positions
Crew Call integration with spice tag scanning
Member Spice Profile with demonstrated proficiency stars
founder_voice_quotes: If you bring your skill (Garlic = Accounting) to our Project Pot, we can all make soup and bread — metaphors for things we need in life and money we make and use and save

title: Bring Popcorn
canonical_topic: Experience layer framing cooperative business-building as a live multi-channel reality show with scheduled viewing, audience vote-gating for content release, and a seven-food-metaphor brand system where popcorn serves as the gateway invitation.
composing_primitives: Viewing Schedule as TV Guide with programming grid
vote-gating engagement threshold for content publication
seven-element food metaphor chain (stone/soup/bread/pudding/spoonfuls/spices/popcorn)
multi-channel BST Series episode structure
audience-to-member onboarding funnel conversion
founder_voice_quotes: This becomes like a reality show - but with business. And you can watch. Daily at 9. Or 11. Or whenever you want. Bring Popcorn.

title: Family Table Trust Graph
canonical_topic: Six-degrees-of-separation trust-scoring system requiring affirmative per-bridge human stamping at each degree and pre-interaction selfie verification, enabling trust-critical member-to-member services without demographic data or anonymous rating systems.
composing_primitives: Degree-of-separation scoring (2.0/1.0/0.5 points per degree)
per-bridge intermediary stamping (per-interaction, not blanket)
pre-interaction selfie timestamped verification
6.0-point threshold for trust-critical interactions
zero demographics architecture integration

title: What-If Commissions
canonical_topic: Pre-drafted anticipatory role-assignment system for on-the-spot meritocratic commission deployment during live conversations, with four-dimensional fractional commitment scoping and automatic platform-routing activation upon recipient signature.
composing_primitives: Pre-authored parameterizable commission templates
fractional commitment dimensions (time/scope/project/decision)
automatic platform-routing update upon signature
'We Need What You're Good At' semantic marker
Founder Contact Dashboard integration per scheduled conversation

title: FocusShell / AppShell Dual Topology

composing_primitives: FocusShell (hero-owns-viewport, no sidebar)
AppShell (collapsible sidebar, operational chrome)
route-level topology declaration enforcement
shared v2-tokens.css design token system
shared InformativeLock/ProofStrip/useTourTarget primitives

title: Design Doctrine (10 Rules Codified in Architecture)
canonical_topic: Ten canonical cooperative design rules encoded directly into component constraints, design tokens, and architectural patterns that make violations structurally difficult, enforcing cooperative economic principles through the component library itself.

v2-tokens.css cooperative value encoding
component primitives enforcing by construction (InformativeLock, ProofStrip, HeroSection)

shell-level topology violation prevention

title: Informative Lock Component
canonical_topic: Cooperative UI access component replacing SaaS paywall patterns with contextual member-capability descriptions, structurally constrained to render only informative cooperative language and prohibited from using extractive vocabulary.
composing_primitives: gateContext prop for contextual action description
cooperative language enforcement (no 'upgrade/premium/unlock')
warm visual treatment with amber palette (never red)
CTA to membership participation page (not pricing page)
Ghost Browse 70/30 preview-to-lock content ratio

title: X-Ray Instrumentation System
canonical_topic: Platform-wide member-facing transparency system using data-xray-id DOM annotations paired with a structured glossary to render visual overlays explaining each platform element's purpose, data sources, and economic/governance connections when transparency mode activates.
composing_primitives: data-xray-id attribute annotation on all significant UI elements
xrayGlossary.ts centralized structured glossary
cyan dashed overlay with floating label badges and click-to-expand panels
member-facing (not developer-facing) transparency mode toggle
build-process requirement for glossary entries on all new pages

title: Character-Voiced Progressive Auth Gate
canonical_topic: Authentication system where a platform mascot character delivers contextual auth messaging through a speech bubble, using server-side email auto-detection to select sign-in vs. sign-up flow automatically with a 3D card-flip transition between them.
composing_primitives: character speech bubble with contextual gateContext message
check_email_registered server-side RPC for auto-flow detection
CSS 3D rotateY card-flip transition between sign-in and sign-up faces
sessionStorage context propagation from ProtectedRoute to Auth page
graceful fallback to manual toggle if RPC not deployed

title: Character Bubble Primitive (Platform Voice Component)
canonical_topic: Universal reusable character-voiced explanation component serving as the cooperative platform's standard rendering surface for all system-to-member communications across auth gates, feature locks, empty states, permission walls, and tutorial overlays.
composing_primitives: CharacterBubble component with title/message/helper/children slots
dark slate background with cyan border and mascot icon
composable with CharacterAuthGate/BeaconBiteNudge/tutorial logic
consistent platform personality across all explanation surfaces

title: Tour Target Annotation System
canonical_topic: Build-time annotation system using a dedicated React hook to attach stable semantic data-tour-target attributes to DOM elements during component rendering, consumed by guided tour overlays to anchor walkthrough steps without fragile CSS selector coupling.
composing_primitives: useTourTarget(targetId) React hook returning annotated ref
data-tour-target attribute as stable semantic identifier
Guided Tour Overlay querying annotation layer at runtime
build-process requirement ensuring every V2 page includes tour targets
dual-layer annotation architecture with X-Ray (discovery) and Tour Target (guided learning)

title: Intent-First Dispatch Composition
canonical_topic: Multi-channel message composition architecture requiring mandatory intent declaration before any drafting begins, generating 11-channel variations as edge deltas from a single canonical message, with a solemn 'As You Wish' stamp confirmation for consequential broadcasts.
composing_primitives: IntentField mandatory gate ('What change are you trying to make?')
CanonicalComposer single-source master message
ChannelVariationsPanel showing only delta from canonical
AsYouWishConfirmation full-screen solemn stamp pattern
MoneyPenny context-aware prior message recall

title: Braided Thread Calendar Visualization
canonical_topic: Calendar system rendering a member's week as seven semantically distinct life-domain threads (personal/family/business/coalition/route/defense/education) in a unified braided temporal view, with a reflection panel limited to exactly one question-framed adjustment suggestion per week.
composing_primitives: seven canonical thread types as TypeScript enum (color+icon per accessibility)
BraidedWeekView rendering overlaps and gaps across all threads
WeekReflectionPanel auto-aggregating time distribution without judgment
one-adjustment-per-week heuristic rule engine
PatternHintCard framing questions not prescriptions ('Do you want to keep saying yes to this pattern?')

title: Judge Reasoning Matrix (Transparent Arbitration Visualization)
canonical_topic: Multi-agent arbitration visualization with four distinct AI judges (Oracle/Morpheus/Red Queen/Dredd) displaying parallel reasoning in a structured matrix with visual convergence/divergence indicators, founder override as annotation layer preserving judge reasoning, and a visible escalation ladder.

four distinct AI judge reasoning profiles
convergence/divergence visual highlighting at-a-glance

EscalationLadder visible pathway and AuditTrailTable permanent record

title: Family Warm Workspace (Age-Appropriate Platform Economics)
canonical_topic: Household coordination workspace architecturally enforcing age-appropriate economic metric visibility (XP shown to minors, ADAPT score hidden at data-fetch level), human-language activity narration feed, and savings-jar family fund visualization within a cooperative multi-currency platform.

human-language activity feed templates ({Name} {verb} {object})
Kanban-lite three-column task board with child drag support
family fund savings-jar metaphor with fill level (not ledger format)
per-member privacy toggle controls with maximally private child defaults
